Clan Serino.description: The Clan Serino is a Camorra-type criminal organization based in Sarno, Salerno, Italy. Founded by Aniello Serino, known as 'O' Pope', it was influential for over twenty years and linked to Carmine Alfieri. The clan is involved in extortion, usury, drug trafficking, and video poker businesses, with a history of conflict with the rival Parlato family. Despite a decline, it remains active according to a 2019 DIA report.

descriptions: Albanian mafia has alliances with the Serino clan.
edges.evidence_quote: the Albanian mafia has alliances with many Camorra clans, including with the Mazzarella clan and the Amato-Pagano clan , both from Naples and with the Serino clan, from Salerno .

descriptions: Serino clan is a Camorra clan.
edges.evidence_quote: the Albanian mafia has alliances with ... the Serino clan, from Salerno

descriptions: Clan Serino is a Camorra clan in contact with Albanian mafia.
edges.evidence_quote: Dalla seconda relazione semestrale del 2010 della DIA vengono illustrati contatti tra la mafia albanese e il clan Mazzarella, con gli Scissionisti di Secondigliano e il clan Serino di Sarno.

descriptions: Serino clan has alliances with Albanian mafia.
edges.evidence_quote: the Albanian mafia has alliances with the Mazzarella clan and with the Scissionisti di Secondigliano, both from Naples and with the Serino clan, from Salerno.

descriptions: A member of Clan Serino killed two nephews of a Graziano family member.
edges.evidence_quote: un esponente del clan Serino avrebbe ucciso nel 1989 due nipoti di uno dei membri di spicco della famiglia Graziano

descriptions: Clan Serino opposed Clan Parlato before a non-aggression pact.
edges.evidence_quote: si era contrapposta l'altra consorteria camorristica sarnese, quella facente capo alla famiglia Parlato

These small units took up names such as Pasukan Siluman (Ghost Squad), Srigala Hitam (Black Jackal), Pemotong Leher (Neck Cutters) and Garuda Putih (White Eagle).

edges.evidence_quote: The Goto-gumi had connections with the Buddhist organization Soka Gakkai .

Turkish mafia.description: The Turkish mafia is a general term for criminal organizations based in Turkey or composed of Turkish citizens. Active since the 1970s, they are involved in drug trafficking, human smuggling, and other crimes, with a strong presence in Western Europe. They have ties to the Turkish deep state and far-right groups like the Grey Wolves. The organization remains active today.

descriptions: Albanian gangs work with Turkish gangs in the UK.
edges.evidence_quote: Albanian gangs are believed to be largely behind sex trafficking, migrant smuggling, as well as working with Turkish gangs in Southend-on-Sea , who control the heroin trade in the United Kingdom .

Los Mexicles.description: Los Mexicles is a Mexican and Mexican-American gang founded in 1987 in Ciudad Juárez, Chihuahua. It operates as an armed wing of the Sinaloa Cartel along the US-Mexico border, engaging in murder, extortion, drug trafficking, kidnapping, and vehicle theft. The gang is composed largely of deportees and Mexican-American citizens, and is known for using Nahuatl language in US prisons to communicate secretly. It remains active, primarily in northern Mexican states and parts of Texas.

Brother Speed Motorcycle Club.description: American outlaw motorcycle club formed in Boise, Idaho in 1969 by a group of high school friends. Active in Idaho, Washington, and Oregon, it has been involved in drug trafficking, weapons offenses, and alliances with other outlaw clubs. The club's colors are black and gold, and its center patch features a winged skull.

descriptions: Infobox lists Brother Speed MC as ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Brother Speed MC , Chicanos MC , Diablos MC , Mobshitters MC , Outlaws MC , Rock Machine MC , Satudarah MC , X-Team , Los Zetas

descriptions: Brother Speed purchased illegal weapons from Aryan Nations members.
edges.evidence_quote: The club has purchased illegal weapons from members of Aryan Nations in northern Idaho.

descriptions: Brother Speed formed an alliance with Bandidos in the early 1990s to strengthen against Hells Angels.
edges.evidence_quote: Fearing that their operations would be taken over by the Hells Angels, the Brother Speed strengthened by beginning an alliance with the Bandidos of Texas in the early 1990s.

descriptions: Brother Speed allegedly associated with Devils Breed to acquire precursor chemicals for methamphetamine.
edges.evidence_quote: The Brother Speed has allegedly associated with the Hells Angels, the Outsiders, and the Devils Breed in order to acquire precursor chemicals used in the manufacture of methamphetamine.

descriptions: Brother Speed members attacked members of the Empties motorcycle club in 2012.
edges.evidence_quote: In May 2012, five of the Idaho Falls members of Brother Speed, attacked two members of Pocatello's Empties motorcycle club at a gathering for a child who was suffering from cancer.

descriptions: Brother Speed allegedly sent methamphetamine to the Rebels in Australia.
edges.evidence_quote: The Brothers Speed in Idaho have allegedly been involved in sending methamphetamine, sealed inside the frames of motorcycles, to the Rebels in Sydney, Australia.

'Ndrina Grande Aracri.description: The Grande Aracri 'ndrina is a clan of the 'Ndrangheta, a criminal organization based in Cutro, Calabria, Italy. Founded in the 1980s by Nicolino Grande Aracri, it expanded drug trafficking across Northern Italy and into Germany, Switzerland, and France. The clan has been involved in violent feuds, infiltrated public contracts, and faced major anti-mafia operations. In 2021, its capobastone began cooperating with authorities.

descriptions: Dragone and Grande Aracri were opposing sides in the Faida di Cutro.
edges.evidence_quote: Faida di Cutro: combattuta tra la fine degli anni '90 e i primi del 2000, ha visto scontrarsi i Dragone e i Grande Aracri

descriptions: Dragone and Grande Aracri were in conflict during the Cutro feud.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 10 maggio 2004 viene ucciso Antonio Dragone e in seguito il suo genero Gaetano Ciampà . La faida riprende nel 2004 con l'omicidio di Franco Arena scoppia una faida fra gli Arena -Dragone e i Nicoscia - Grande Aracri

descriptions: Dragone and Grande Aracri made a mafia peace in 2025.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 12 marzo del 2025 scatta l’operazione Ten. Si tratta di una “pace mafiosa” tra i Dragone e I Grande Aracri

descriptions: Farao-Marincola were arrested alongside Grande Aracri in the same operation, indicating cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 4 giugno 2013 con l'operazione Old Family a Crotone vengono arrestate 35 persone appartenenti alle cosche Vrenna-Ciampà-Corigliano-Bonaventura , Farao-Marincola, Ciampà-Megna-Cazzato , Grande Aracri e Morabito accusati a vario titolo di associazione di tipo mafioso estorsioni, detenzione di armi e traffico di stupefacenti e di armi

edges.evidence_quote: was involved in a bloody conflict against the Arena-Dragone alliance

descriptions: Grande Aracri and Capicchiano were allies in a faida against Arena, Trapasso, Dragone, and Megna.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 3 marzo 2000 ... scoppia una faida tra i Grande Aracri- Nicoscia -Capicchiano e Russelli e gli Arena - Trapasso - Dragone e Megna

descriptions: Grande Aracri helped the Valerio family in a shooting attack.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 1º maggio ci fu una sparatoria ... fatta partire dalla 'Ndrina della famiglia 'Valerio' ... aiutati dai loro alleati (Grande Aracri)

descriptions: Greco is listed as an allied 'ndrina.
edges.evidence_quote: 'Ndrine alleate - Greco con a capo Angelo Greco ( 1965 )

descriptions: Grande Aracri and Russelli were allies in a faida against Arena, Trapasso, Dragone, and Megna.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 3 marzo 2000 ... scoppia una faida tra i Grande Aracri- Nicoscia -Capicchiano e Russelli e gli Arena - Trapasso - Dragone e Megna

descriptions: Grande Aracri formed an alliance with Vrenna-Bonaventura to split illegal profits.
edges.evidence_quote: Nel 2000, sempre secondo il pentito Cortese, emerge un'alleanza con i Vrenna-Bonaventura per dividere al 50% i guadagni delle attività illegali di Cutro

descriptions: Grande Aracri allied with Vrenna-Bonaventura.
edges.evidence_quote: the 'ndrina allied with other groups, in particular with the Vrenna-Bonaventura 'ndrina

descriptions: Mannolo is allied with Grande Aracri.
edges.evidence_quote: I Mannolo sono una 'ndrina della 'ndrangheta calabrese originaria di Cutro e di San Leonardo di Cutro , alleata dei Trapasso-Zoffreo , dei Pane-Iazzolino , e dei Grande Aracri di Cutro .

descriptions: Morabito and these cosche were arrested together in the Old Family operation, indicating association.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 4 giugno 2013 con l'operazione Old Family a Crotone vengono arrestate 35 persone appartenenti alle cosche Vrenna-Ciampà-Corigliano-Bonaventura, Farao-Marincola, Ciampà-Megna-Cazzato, Grande Aracri e Morabito

descriptions: The Nicoscia are allied with the Grande Aracri.
edges.evidence_quote: alleata con i Grande Aracri e i Russelli

descriptions: The text states Pane-Iazzolino are allies of Grande Aracri.
edges.evidence_quote: Sarebbero alleati dei Grande Aracri e dei Mannolo di Cutro , con i Ferrazzo di Mesoraca e con i Farao-Marincola di Cirò .

descriptions: The Scumaci are allied with the Grande Aracri.
edges.evidence_quote: Sarebbero alleati dei Grande Aracri dei Trapasso-Zoffreo e Mannolo di Cutro e con i Tropea-Talarico di Cropani .

descriptions: Trapasso is allied with Grande Aracri.
edges.evidence_quote: I Trapasso sono una 'ndrina della 'ndrangheta calabrese originaria di Cutro e Steccato di Cutro , alleata dei Mannolo e dei Grande Aracri di Cutro .

descriptions: Vrenna is connected with Grande Aracri among other families.
edges.evidence_quote: È collegata con tutte le famiglie del crotonese come i Megna , gli Iona e i Grande Aracri .

descriptions: Giglio is allied with Grande Aracri.
edges.evidence_quote: Sarebbero alleati dei Grande Aracri e dei Mannolo di Cutro , dei Farao-Marincola di Cirò e dei Levato.

Rollin' 90s Neighborhood Crips.description: The Rollin' 90s Neighborhood Crips are a set of the Crips gang alliance based in South Los Angeles, California. Formed in the late 1970s or early 1980s, they are primarily African-American and engage in drug trafficking and murder. The gang has expanded to other U.S. cities and Canada, and is allied with the Rollin' 60s Neighborhood Crips while rivaling the Eight Trey Gangster Crips.

descriptions: Rollin' 90's NHC is an ally of Rollin' 60s.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Rollin 40's and Rollin 90's NHCs

descriptions: Rollin' 90s Neighborhood Crips are rivals with Crenshaw Mafia Gangster Bloods.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: ... Crenshaw Mafia Gangster Bloods

descriptions: Rollin' 90s Neighborhood Crips is a subset of the Crips alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: The Rollin' 90s Neighborhood Crips are a " set " of the larger Crips gang alliance

descriptions: Rollin' 90s Neighborhood Crips are rivals with Eight Trey Gangster Crips.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Eight Trey Gangster Crips

descriptions: Rollin' 40s Crips joined the alliance with Rollin' 60s and Rollin' 90s.
edges.evidence_quote: this alliance has since spread to other gangs, including the Rollin' 40s Crips

descriptions: Rollin' 90s Crips and Rollin' 60s Crips formed an alliance at a 1983 party.
edges.evidence_quote: the two gangs decided to unite, and this alliance has since spread to other gangs, including the Rollin' 40s Crips

descriptions: Rollin' 90s Crips branched off from Rollin' 60s Crips.
edges.evidence_quote: the Rollin' 90s Crips branched off from the Rollin' 60s Crips

descriptions: Bloque Vencedores de Arauca supported Miguel Arroyave's Bloque Centauros against ACC.
edges.evidence_quote: Algunas versiones apuntan a asegurar que el Bloque Vencedores de Arauca (otro aliado de las AUC) llegó por el norte para apoyar a las tropas de Miguel Arroyave

Milenio Cartel.description: Mexican criminal organization based in Michoacán, founded in the 1970s by Emilio Valencia Barragán. Dedicated to drug trafficking, particularly cocaine, and involved in homicide, kidnapping, extortion, money laundering, and arms trafficking. It was considered one of the most violent and powerful cartels in Mexico, responsible for a third of cocaine consumed in the United States. The cartel was dismantled in 2009.

descriptions: Colima Cartel listed as allied with Milenio Cartel in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Sinaloa Cartel, Guadalajara Cartel Milenio Cartel Sonora Cartel

descriptions: Cártel de Colima is allied with Cártel del Milenio.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: Cártel de Sinaloa , Cártel del Milenio , Cartel de Guadalajara .

descriptions: La Resistencia was originally composed of gunmen from the Milenio Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: La Resistencia gang was originally created by Sinaloa Cartel leader Ignacio Coronel Villarreal in 2010 ... Originally, La Resistencia was composed of gunmen from the Milenio Cartel which was loyal to the Sinaloa Cartel.

descriptions: Milenio Cartel disputed drug corridors with Gulf Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: Los Chachos, a group of drug traffickers under the orders of the Milenio Cartel, who disputed the drug corridors of Tamaulipas with the Gulf Cartel in 2003.

descriptions: The infobox lists Milenio Cartel as an ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Beltrán-Leyva Cartel, Milenio Cartel

descriptions: Infobox lists Milenio Cartel as an ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Milenio Cartel

descriptions: CJNG split from Milenio Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: CJNG started in 2009 as one of the splits of the Milenio Cartel

descriptions: CJNG originated as a split from the Milenio Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: CJNG started in 2009 as one of the splits of the Milenio Cartel

descriptions: CJNG splintered from Milenio Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: The Jalisco New Generation Cartel was born from the splintering of the Milenio Cartel in 2010.

descriptions: CJNG was a splinter group from the Milenio Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: Cártel de Jalisco Nueva Generación el cual era una escisión del Cártel del Milenio

descriptions: Cártel del Milenio is listed as an ally in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: La Nueva Familia Michoacana, Los Viagras, Caballeros Templarios, Cártel del Milenio, Cártel de Tláhuac, Cártel de Sinaloa, Mara Salvatrucha

descriptions: Listed as an ally in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: Cártel del Milenio

descriptions: La Mano con Ojos is a remnant of Los Valencia.
edges.evidence_quote: La Mano con Ojos fue una organización criminal mexicana dedicada al tráfico ilegal de drogas y a la producción de metanfetamina, siendo remanentes del Cártel de los Beltrán Leyva y Los Valencia.

descriptions: Infobox lists La Resistencia as an enemy of Cártel del Milenio.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: La Resistencia , Los Zetas , La Familia Michoacana

descriptions: La Resistencia is listed as an ally of Milenio Cartel in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Sinaloa Cartel, La Resistencia

descriptions: Gulf Cartel is listed as a rival of Milenio Cartel in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Gulf Cartel

descriptions: Cártel del Milenio attempted to expand into areas controlled by Cártel del Golfo after its leader's capture.
edges.evidence_quote: Tras la captura de Benjamín Arellano Félix y la muerte de su hermano Ramón Arellano Félix, del Cártel de Tijuana , así como la detención y extradición de Osiel Cárdenas Guillén , líder del Cártel del Golfo , los Valencia intentaron extender su zona de influencia a Tijuana , Tamaulipas y Nuevo León .

descriptions: Milenio Cartel had territorial conflicts with Gulf Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: Los Valencia ( Cartel del Milenio ), estos últimos teniendo problemas territoriales con el Cártel del Golfo, pues su brazo armado Los Zetas se habían adueñado de varias plazas suyas.

descriptions: Knights Templar Cartel is listed as a rival of Milenio Cartel in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Knights Templar Cartel

descriptions: Infobox lists La Familia Michoacana as an enemy of Cártel del Milenio.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: La Resistencia , Los Zetas , La Familia Michoacana

descriptions: Milenio remnants reached a working agreement with La Familia Michoacana.
edges.evidence_quote: Other remnants of the Milenio that splintered from the Sinaloa Cartel. went independent and reached a working agreement with La Familia Michoacana

descriptions: Los Zetas invaded Michoacán to take control by force, leading to clashes with Cártel del Milenio.
edges.evidence_quote: A partir del 2005 el grupo conocido como Los Zetas (bajo el mando del cartel del golfo) incursionaron en el estado de Michoacán para tomar el control de este por la fuerza, recrudeciendo los enfrentamientos y la violencia en el estado.

descriptions: Milenio Cartel had territorial conflicts with Los Zetas.
edges.evidence_quote: Los Valencia ( Cartel del Milenio ), estos últimos teniendo problemas territoriales con el Cártel del Golfo, pues su brazo armado Los Zetas se habían adueñado de varias plazas suyas.

descriptions: Milenio remnants forged a loose alliance with a faction of Los Zetas.
edges.evidence_quote: the former Milenio Cartel members relocated to Guadalajara and forged a loose alliance with a faction of Los Zetas Cartel

descriptions: Cártel del Milenio formed an alliance with Los Zetas in 2017.
edges.evidence_quote: En 2017, se halló una narco-manta en la cual venía un mensaje claro sobre la alianza que tiene con Los Zetas, dejando así la alianza que tenía con el Cártel de Sinaloa (CDS) .

descriptions: Milenio Cartel had close connections with Medellín Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: By the mid 1990s they had close connections with Colombian traffickers like Fabio Ochoa Vásquez of the Medellín Cartel

descriptions: Milenio Cartel became a branch of the Sinaloa Federation under Sinaloa Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: their new leader, Óscar Orlando Nava Valencia, associated with the Sinaloa Cartel. As a result, the Milenio Cartel became a branch of what was known as the Sinaloa Federation

descriptions: Cártel del Milenio associated with Cártel de Sinaloa for drug trafficking control.
edges.evidence_quote: A partir de 2016 , Luis Valencia junto con su colaborador, Óscar Orlando Nava Valencia (más conocido como El Lobo Valencia ), se han asociado con el Cártel de Sinaloa para el control del tráfico de droga en los estados de Jalisco , Nayarit y Michoacán .

descriptions: Milenio Cartel became a branch of the Sinaloa Cartel by 2007.
edges.evidence_quote: By 2007, the Sonora Cartel, Colima Cartel , and Milenio Cartel became branches of the Sinaloa Cartel .

descriptions: Cártel del Milenio attempted to expand into Tijuana after the fall of Cártel de Tijuana leaders.
edges.evidence_quote: Tras la captura de Benjamín Arellano Félix y la muerte de su hermano Ramón Arellano Félix, del Cártel de Tijuana , así como la detención y extradición de Osiel Cárdenas Guillén , líder del Cártel del Golfo , los Valencia intentaron extender su zona de influencia a Tijuana , Tamaulipas y Nuevo León .

descriptions: Sinaloa Cartel allied with Milenio Cartel (Los Valencia).
edges.evidence_quote: el Chapo Guzmán acuerda una alianza con otros capos, entre ellos Nazario Moreno González , Vicente Carrillo Fuentes , Los Beltrán Leyva y Los Valencia ( Cartel del Milenio )

descriptions: Milenio Cartel became a branch of Sinaloa Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: The Milenio (Michoacán) , Jalisco (Guadalajara), Sonora (Sonora) , and Colima cartels were now branches of the Sinaloa Cartel.

descriptions: The Cartel del Milenio incorporated into the Cartel de Sinaloa.
edges.evidence_quote: el Cartel del Milenio se incorporó al Cartel de Sinaloa

descriptions: Clan Giostrai was later incorporated under the central authority of the Mala del Brenta.
edges.evidence_quote: In the 1980s, just before the emergence of the Mala del Brenta, there were already a few organized crime syndicates that would later be incorporated under the central authority of the Mala del Brenta. These organizations included: - "Clan Giostrai"

descriptions: Licciardi and Sautto-Ciccarelli clans coordinated in a murder.
edges.evidence_quote: The killing, reportedly orchestrated by both the Licciardi and Sautto-Ciccarelli clans in coordination with the Abbinante clan, was interpreted by prosecutors as both an act of strategic retribution and an assertion of territorial dominance.

descriptions: Sautto-Ciccarelli and Abbinante clans coordinated in a murder.
edges.evidence_quote: The killing, reportedly orchestrated by both the Licciardi and Sautto-Ciccarelli clans in coordination with the Abbinante clan, was interpreted by prosecutors as both an act of strategic retribution and an assertion of territorial dominance.

descriptions: The Vallelunga Pratameno family collaborated with the Catania family (Santapaola faction) in the murder of Giuseppe Calderone.
edges.evidence_quote: This collaboration among multiple families from different provinces, all linked to the Corleonesi , underscores the coordinated effort behind Calderone’s elimination.

descriptions: Blue Angels formed an alliance with the Road Rats of London.
edges.evidence_quote: The Blue Angels began associating with motorcycle clubs in England during the 1970s, forming an alliance with the Road Rats of London

Clan Pariante.description: Camorra clan operating in the western suburbs of Naples, specifically in Bacoli and Monte di Procida. Founded by Rosario Pariante, who was originally the right-hand man of Paolo Di Lauro. The clan split from the Di Lauro clan in 2004, triggering the First Scampia feud. Currently led by Genny Pariante, son of Rosario.

descriptions: Pariante and others split from the Di Lauro clan, starting a conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: insieme a Gennaro Marino e Arcangelo Abete decide la scissione dal clan

descriptions: Rosario Pariante helped Paolo Di Lauro found the Di Lauro clan, indicating cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: Infatti, Pariante aiuterà Di Lauro a fondare il suo impero criminale, il clan Di Lauro.

descriptions: The split from Di Lauro led to the formation of the Scissionisti, with Pariante aligned with them.
edges.evidence_quote: Inizia così la Prima faida di Scampia.

descriptions: Pariante clan became a rival after being a former ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Former allies: , Pariante clan

descriptions: Pariante clan joined the Scissionisti alliance in late 2004.
edges.evidence_quote: Pariante clan (Bacoli, Monte di Procida) - Boss: Rosario Pariante (Pariante was a former Di Lauro lieutenant, who split with the group joining the scissionisti alliance in late 2004).

descriptions: Fresh Off the Boat Killers members were recruited to assassinate the Bacon brothers.
edges.evidence_quote: In early 2008, Clayton Roueche recruited two members of Calgary's Fresh Off the Boat Killers gang, namely Billy Ly and Troy Tran, to come to the Lower Mainland to kill the Bacon brothers.

descriptions: United Nations allied with Fresh Off the Boat Killers, providing cocaine and oversight.
edges.evidence_quote: Roueche forged a close alliance with the Fresh Off the Boat Killers, a Calgary gang made up of Chinese-Canadians, Korean-Canadians and Vietnamese-Canadians.

descriptions: Misura was a breakaway faction from Misurasata.
edges.evidence_quote: The Misurasata movement split in 1983, with the breakaway Misura group

descriptions: The Cirillo clan allied with the Pino-Sena faction.
edges.evidence_quote: con i Pino-Sena invece i Muto di Cetraro , i Basile-Calvano di San Lucido e i Cirillo.

descriptions: Pracheachon was founded by KPRP members.
edges.evidence_quote: In late 1954, those who stayed in Cambodia founded a legal political party, the Pracheachon

Beland crime family.description: American criminal organization based in Fort Worth, Texas, led by Lucy 'Ma' Beland. Active from the 1910s to the 1940s, the family sold narcotics including morphine, cocaine, and heroin. Members were convicted of narcotics crimes at least 30 times between 1921 and 1947. The organization is now defunct.

descriptions: The Beland family took over international trafficking after the Ginsberg-Kayne-Gordon syndicate was arrested.
edges.evidence_quote: After the Federal Bureau of Narcotics under Harry J. Anslinger arrested the Texas-based Ginsberg-Kayne-Gordon criminal syndicate in 1936, the Belands were able to take over international trafficking.

descriptions: The text speculates that Lola la Chata may have supplied heroin to the Beland family.
edges.evidence_quote: It is not known if the Beland family's supply of heroin came from Lola la Chata, a contemporary Mexican drug trafficker.

descriptions: YACS acted as an enforcement arm for American Mafia families.
edges.evidence_quote: The YACS group has also been recruited as an "enforcement arm" for American Mafia crime families.

descriptions: The Lenox Street Boys have a rivalry with the Franklin Hill Giants.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Columbia Point Dawgs (long-standing), Vamp Hill Boys, H Block, X-men, Franklin Hill Giants, Greenwood Street Posse, Ruggles St , 1850 Washington St, Castle Square Cubs

descriptions: The Provisional IRA engaged in a violent feud with the Official IRA in 1975.
edges.evidence_quote: McKee was criticised for allowing the IRA to become involved in sectarian killings, as well a feud with the Official IRA in October and November 1975 that left eleven people dead.

descriptions: The Provisional IRA split from the Official IRA in 1969, initially being the minority faction.
edges.evidence_quote: The Provisional IRA emerged in December 1969, due to a split within the previous incarnation of the IRA and the broader Irish republican movement . It was initially the minority faction in the split compared to the Official IRA but became the dominant faction by 1972.

descriptions: The Provisional IRA split from the Official IRA in 1969.
edges.evidence_quote: The Provisional IRA emerged in December 1969, due to a split within the previous incarnation of the IRA and the broader Irish republican movement.
